rules.label: Severe illness with normal activity
rules.explanation_template: normal activity status conflicts with collapse, cyanosis, or shock-level severity cues

rules.label: Severe illness with normal appetite
rules.explanation_template: normal appetite is difficult to reconcile with a collapse or shock-level presentation

rules.label: Bradycardia with dehydration
rules.explanation_template: bradycardia with dehydration is an atypical pairing

rules.label: Abdominal distension without pain behavior
rules.explanation_template: marked abdominal distension is atypical when pain behavior is explicitly absent

rules.label: Urinary obstruction pattern with normal urination
rules.explanation_template: reported normal urination conflicts with an obstructive urinary pattern

rules.label: Respiratory distress with normal respiratory effort
rules.explanation_template: reported normal respiratory effort conflicts with respiratory distress cues

rules.label: Productive vomiting with non-productive retching
rules.explanation_template: structured or free-text history contains both productive vomiting and unproductive retching

rules.label: Acute emergency cluster with chronic duration
rules.explanation_template: high-acuity emergency cues conflict with a chronic-duration history

rules.label: Infectious pattern with low-contact context
rules.explanation_template: infectious respiratory pattern conflicts with isolated or low-contact exposure context

rules.label: Afebrile report despite high-acuity pattern
rules.explanation_template: explicit afebrile history is atypical in a high-acuity systemic presentation
